_doc: The lens registry for the review engine. One row per craft lens a review run can apply. `file` is the craft KB lens file a scanner subagent loads (and ONLY that file). `scope`: 'line' = span-anchored findings tied to a page (queueable to a fix pass); 'structural' = chapter/book-level findings (manual). `route` = which apply pass a QUEUED finding flows to (deai|variety|manual) — the review engine itself never writes Drive. Authority order: the `file` research is the sole ruler, then model training — there is NO voiceprint file (a prior one was retired for canonizing AI patterns as the author's voice); the author is the veto, applied by hand at triage. The prose-VOICE line lenses (sentence-craft, sentence-power, sentence-variety, sound-like-yourself, pro-level) were RETIRED July 2026 by author direction — they reverse-engineered surface rules that flattened the prose. Line-level sentence/voice craft now lives in the author's Obsidian vault (vault `ryanboog`, folder `Writing/Craft Notes`, ~152 notes); query it with the `obsidian` CLI (`obsidian search`, `obsidian read`), never grep the local tree. ai-fingerprints stays as the only local de-AI flag list. dialect-gradient is intentionally ABSENT: that lens is the /arc pass and would duplicate it.

lenses.title: World breaking over world building (no infodump)
Ten worst dialogue failure modes + subtext rule
